metadata.method: 500 highest role-relevance scores from the official IND recognised-sponsor register; relevance uses transparent company-name signals and known target matches.
metadata.disclaimer: IND recognition is strong sponsorship evidence, but does not guarantee sponsorship for every vacancy.
